steps.title: Step 1
steps.content: Each tray holds at least 45 and at most 55 rolls.

steps.title: Step 2
steps.content: With 4 trays, the minimum total is 4 × 45 = 180 and the maximum is 4 × 55 = 220.

steps.title: Step 3
steps.content: Any valid answer must satisfy 180 ≤ total ≤ 220.

steps.title: Step 4
steps.content: Check each choice against this range.

eliminationHtml:
• Choice A — 145: 145 < 180, below the minimum possible total. ✗
  • Choice B — 185: 180 ≤ 185 ≤ 220, achievable (e.g., three trays of 45 and one of 50). ✓
  • Choice C — 225: 225 > 220, above the maximum possible total. ✗
  • Choice D — 265: 265 > 220, well above the maximum possible total. ✗
B is correct.
